name: libbluetooth-dev
title: libbluetooth-dev
summary: Development files for using the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth library
description:
Development files for using the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth library
BlueZ is the official Linux Bluetooth protocol stack. It is an Open Source
project distributed under GNU General Public License (GPL).
.
This package contains the development libraries and header files you need to
develop your programs using the libbluetooth library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libbluetooth-dev because Development files for using the BlueZ Linux Bluetooth library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libbluetooth-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libbluetooth-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libbluetooth-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
